title: Smaller Books
description: Smaller books and paper textures for a cleaner and more compact look. Perfect for minimal and modern resource packs.
body:
![Smaller Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a85a5da161f1a17f2597c1a77f60a724f1f9744.png)

This resource pack redesigns all book-related items and paper in Minecraft 1.21, making them smaller, cleaner and more compact while keeping a vanilla-friendly look.

The goal of the pack is to reduce visual clutter and improve readability, especially in inventories, item frames, lecterns, and interfaces where books are frequently used.

Features:



Smaller textures for all books (and paper) available in Minecraft 1.21

-Includes paper with matching size and style

-Clean, compact, and consistent design

-Vanilla-style colors and details preserved

-Works seamlessly with other vanilla-friendly resource packs
